name: Source Capital Funding, INC.
description_short: San Diego-based direct hard money lender offering fast real estate loans secured by residential, commercial, and industrial properties with 7-10 day funding and no prepayment penalties.
description_long:
Source Capital Funding, Inc. is a direct hard money lender based in San Diego, California, operating since 2007. The company specializes in asset-based lending secured by real estate, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional bank financing for property investors and owners who need fast capital access. With over 40 years of combined team experience, they have funded more than $550 million in loans across Arizona, California, Colorado, Minnesota, and Texas.

The company offers hard money loans secured by single-family, multi-family, commercial, and industrial properties. Their core service model emphasizes speed and simplicity: loans can be approved within 24 hours and funded within 7-10 days. They explicitly do not require strong credit scores, stable income documentation, or traditional underwriting criteria. Instead, lending decisions focus on the value of the real estate collateral. The company advertises no prepayment penalties, no appraisal fees, and a web-based platform for streamlined communication. They fund up to 65% of the property's "as is" value or purchase price, whichever is less.

Source Capital differentiates itself through direct lending (all underwriting and decisions made in-house), claimed Google 5-star ratings, capital backing from accredited investors, and broker collaboration features. Their website emphasizes transparency, direct communication, and rapid turnaround compared to traditional lenders. They position themselves as accessible to borrowers with poor credit, limited income, past bankruptcy, or foreclosure history—demographics typically rejected by conventional lenders.

As a hard money lender, this company operates in a higher-risk lending segment with significantly higher interest rates and fees than traditional mortgages. While the speed and flexibility are genuine advantages, borrowers should understand that hard money loans are short-term products typically used for investment properties or bridge financing, not primary residence purchases. The company does not fund after-repair-value (ARV) loans, limiting utility for pure fix-and-flip scenarios. No specific APR or fee ranges are disclosed on the website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Funding available within 7-10 days from initial contact; approval decisions made within 24 hours
No prepayment penalties and no appraisal fees charged
Direct lender with in-house underwriting and single point of contact; no broker intermediaries required
Accessible to borrowers with poor credit, low income, past bankruptcy, or foreclosure history
Backed by well-capitalized accredited investors ensuring immediate access to lending capital
Web-based platform with full transparency and broker collaboration features for real estate agents
Loans secured by diverse property types: single-family, multi-family, commercial, and industrial real estate
cons: Hard money loans carry significantly higher interest rates and fees than traditional mortgages; specific rates not disclosed on website
Only funds up to 65% of property's 'as is' value, requiring borrowers to source additional capital for rehabilitation or down payments
Does not fund after-repair-value (ARV) loans, limiting utility for fix-and-flip investors
Loans are short-term products not suitable for primary residence purchases or long-term financing
Minimal disclosure of specific terms, APR ranges, or fee structures on website; requires direct contact for pricing
best_for: Real estate investors needing quick capital for property purchases or bridge loans between transactions
Property owners with poor credit or non-traditional income seeking to leverage real estate equity
Commercial or industrial property investors requiring fast approval without extensive financial documentation
Real estate brokers and agents seeking reliable lender partnerships for clients who don't qualify for traditional financing
diagnosis: Source Capital Funding is best suited for real estate investors and property owners who need fast capital based on real estate collateral rather than credit scores or income verification. The main caveat is that hard money loans carry substantially higher costs than traditional mortgages and are short-term products designed for investment properties or bridge financing, not primary residence purchases or long-term mortgages—borrowers must understand and accept these tradeoffs for speed and accessibility.
services: Hard money loans secured by single-family residential properties
Hard money loans secured by multi-family residential properties
Hard money loans secured by commercial properties
Hard money loans secured by industrial properties
Investment property purchase financing up to 65% of 'as is' value
Equity-based lending on existing real estate assets
Fast loan approvals with 24-hour decision timeline
Streamlined web-based loan application and tracking platform
Broker and real estate agent collaboration and transparency portal
Direct lender services with in-house underwriting and funding
Loans available in Arizona, California, Colorado, Minnesota, and Texas
Telephone and online consultation with lending decision makers
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 600 W Broadway Suite 700, San Diego, CA 92101
meta_description: Source Capital Funding is a San Diego hard money lender offering fast real estate loans with 7-10 day funding.
